goal: Fix hardcoded secrets, permit-all bypass, RSA key regeneration, actuator/swagger exposure, and interest rate validation

tasks.name: Fix SecurityConfig (B5, W2)
tasks.action: Change .anyRequest().permitAll() to .authenticated(). Restrict actuator to ADMIN role. Restrict Swagger to authenticated users.

tasks.name: Fix AuthorizationServerConfig (B4, W1)
tasks.action: Externalize client secrets to @Value properties with env var placeholders. Load RSA keys from config with dev fallback.

commitMessage: fix(security,loan): harden security config, externalize secrets, add rate validation
